name: Snake Houdini +Supp: In The Shadows
description:
hi! heres text and pic:

SNAKE HOUDINI

Snake Houdini is a beach-metal cult from Oslo, featuring members with names like Tor Arne Fuglestveit (vocals), Endre Bruskeland (guitar), Morten Myklebust (bass), and Dag Otto Lund Christensen (drums). Snake has been a band since 2023 and currently has enough material for a half-hour live set. If you’re into Scandi/stoner vibes and seductive grooves, there’s a good chance you’ll like Snake Houdini.

IN THE SHADOWS

In the Shadows is three middle-aged blokes playing dad rock.
